This classification is based on the plant's unique characteristics and growth habits. Thecophyllum splitgerberi is native to Southeast Asia and is known to thrive in tropical regions. It belongs to the genus Thecophyllum, which is a relatively rare and lesser-known genus. Further classification may also include the order and division of the plant, but more specific information is not readily available.
